general.title: MOSuite-batch-correct
general.instructions: batch correct counts in a multiOmicsDataSet

parameters.name: multiOmicDataSet file pattern
parameters.description: Regular expression pattern to match a multiOmicDataset RDS file in data/

parameters.name: Batch column name
parameters.description: Column from sample metadata containing batch information

parameters.name: Covariate columns
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of columns containing variables of interest (e.g. phenotype, treatment)
parameters.help_text: Do not include the batch column here. Most commonly this will be the Group column.

parameters.name: Count type
parameters.description: Type of counts to batch correct. Must be a count type in names(moo@counts)

parameters.name: Sub count type
parameters.description: If count_type is a list, specify the sub count type (e.g. voom, rlog)

parameters.name: Feature ID column name
parameters.description: Column from the counts data containing Feature IDs
parameters.help_text: Leave blank to use the first column in the counts matrix by default

parameters.name: Sample ID column name
parameters.description: Column from the sample metadata containing sample names
parameters.help_text: Leave blank to use the first column in the sample metadata by default

parameters.name: Label column name
parameters.description: Column from sample metadata containing labels for plots
parameters.help_text: Leave blank to use the sample ID column

parameters.name: Samples to include
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of samples to include
parameters.help_text: Leave blank to include all samples

parameters.name: Colors for plots
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of colors for PCA and histogram
parameters.help_text: Use color names or hex codes. Leave blank to use defaults
